titleStmt.title: SII 35.17: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 17. (A.R. No. 78 of 1951-52.) BĀḶAMBĪḌ, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone (No. V) set up near the Vishaharēśvara temple.
This inscription referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva is dated Śaka 979 (in words), Viḷambi, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1058, March 29, Sunday, f.d.t. 03.

It describes the Banavāsi country, its illustrious town Mahātaṭāka-grāma and its highly learned Mahājanas. It also records the gift of the tank area (called kṛishṇa-taṭāka) with the whole quantity of water in it, after purchase from and with the consent of the Mahājanas for the exclusive benefit of the deity Aṇḍurēśvara by several persons (whose names are specified). Bhaṭṭa Vishṇu composed the record. Kāśyapa-Mādhva wrote it handsomely on stone and rūvāri Nāki engraved it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmadāṁgīrasagōtrada
ka makradiṁtara putra
ṣōttamayyaṁ dēvara ga¨rbbhagrahamaṁ māḍisidarū
© svasti Āsīdaśēṣanarapatimakuṭamaṇimayūkhamaṁjarīraṁjitapādapīṭhapratāpadava da hanajvāḷāva
ḷisamālīḍhānamrapā¨rtthivassakaḷadigvijayōpā¨rjjitavīralakṣmīsamāliṁgitaviśāḷavakṣa sthaḷōdānavārisa sakta
vibudha madhukaranikarōjaḷadhiriva ratnākarō nārāyaṇaiva lakṣmīnivāsaśśaśāṁkaiva kaḷādharaṁ prabhākara Ivōstrapratāpa
ścaturānanaiva prajānādassinānirivāmighaśaktidharōbhūtanāthaivabhūdhara śikharādivāsōṁgaja Ivāṁganājana manaḥ
kṣabhajananaparājita Ivā¨rtthapatiḥ kalpapādapa Iva prātyatā¨rtthaprada kī¨rttisudhādhavaḷita brahnāṇḍakuharēśvara cō
ḷa koṁkaṇa gu¨rjjara māḷava kaurava paṁcāla gauḍa kaḷiṁgāṁga vaṁgamahipati saṁpāditākṣaya kōśaḥ kōśala
Animajjitāśēṣavīramahēśaṁ Īśacaraṇāraviṁdamadhukaraḥ karasaṁva¨rdhitanikhiḷabhuvagōva nāri kētuṁ vāmā
ṣaśarāsanakā¨ryaṁ kā¨ryakā¨ryavivēka cātu¨ryavācasvati¨rvācasvatisadṛśa vividhavibudha bōdhōddhyāyamā
namānasāndhakāraḥ śrīmāñjayasiṁhadēvaścāḷukyābharaṇaḥ . © tasyātmaja śśatruviḷāsinīnāṁ vaidhavya dīkṣāgururāhavō
kkaḥsaśāntirāmahavamalladēvōniṣkaṁṭakāmapprativīraśabdaḥ yaśya pratāpadahanānaḷavisphuḷiṁgu¨rnni¨rmmūḷitāḷatyumahīru
hēṣūṁĀdyapirāḍumavaṇaṁ nahitēkṣamantibhūkaṁṭakōddharaṇayatnaparāyaṇasya . yaṁkoṁ ka¨rṇānbaṇḍi
tamānada¨rppana kādidakṣatasatyavādasatyajitānidita rājacihnanyātāgabṟutā nālvavasuccubhayuṁ .
dhārāpi yēnōddhatavikramēṇasaṁda¨rśitā pū¨rvvamahipatināṁ Āda¨rṣaṇiyābaligoṁka mukhyapracaṇḍasāma
ntapurassarēṇaḥ . laṁkānāthasamānacōḷanṛpatiyassayatiprāvṛtaṁ nāgāṇaṁdaśabhiḥ śatairadi balisannāhi
bhassatsareḥ yaśōrāghavavajjaṣānaniśitu bhū¨rṇyiranāyāsatōbhūdēvūṣahitāya sannute padaṁ cāḷu
kyarāmōbali śrīmanāhavamallō vidyaśūyānvitūdharāṁ śāntidha¨rmmā¨rtthamāna hētuvu pākṣikavrataśśa
rāyikaḥ . tasminnarapatē mahīṁ śāsativa¨rṇnasaṁkarōtpanna kāyasthebhyinṛtrada¨rlekṣa staskaṁśabdaḥ
svarūpa vācakō vyeyyākaraṇasiddhānta Ivanya¨rtthabhāvātsaṁvṛttaḥ Upasa¨rggēśca dātu prayōgāḍaṁ nṛtya du
¨rdda¨rśūvigrahaśvasamāsatadditavyābyanādanṛtratatparipālitāyāda rāṁganāyāmukhadita vanavāsidē
śūramaṇiyastattilaka Iva ma¨rhātaṭāka grāmā rājatē . yatradvijāśśamadamādi guṇerupētā svādhyayā
yajñajapahōmasamādhiniṣṭhāḥ Adhyāpanādhyayana yājana dānamu¨rcaikṣaṭka¨rmmabhi¨rnnijagṛhē ṣu sadāramanti
yatratyapaṁḍitajanaviduṣaḥ pṛthivyarādēvi jitṛvijayaṁ nijamātanuti vyabyana ciṁtana vicāraṇa
vādaśikṣavyāpārava¨rggacaturaḥ pṛthivīpradīpaḥ . yatratyadyetārigra¨rstanirastapṛdṛccāraṇadōṣa va¨rjjitaṁ
svarava¨rṇnipadakramasaṁhitāyada Akṣanāmadiyānāḥ nijātkaruṣamapakṣamā¨rṇnassahastaṁ viśatica
tvāriṁśataṁmaśitaṁ śataṁviṁśatyuttaraṁ cavādā¨rna sadasyadiṁyite . yatrakalpasūtra śrāviṇaśpātrādviya parika
lpituṣṭika pāśyaka sūmikavidikāḥ svaparikalpitāhavaniyādṛśayaḥ spūtprekṣītapatniśā Asadūhaviddā
nacātpālaśāmitra ma¨rjjū¨rliyāgnidriyadiṣṇyastāva pradēśāstattakkratu prayāgaṁ sahābhyasuṁ¨rtyiva māḍigu
ṇalaṁkarāyaśēṣagrāma mahājanāya pādapūjā datpā śakanṛpātīta saṁvatsaraṣu navaśētēṣṭi kōnāśityādikēṣu
viḷaṁbisaṁvatsara vaiśākha śuddha tṛtiyāmādityavārē kuḍucaṇnayāṁgīrasagōtra śrīdharōpādhyāyasūnu
prabhu mahādēvayya . Antavvēnadi Āvaṇagrāmasamudbhyatātrēyagōtrā Adudvivēdisūnuṣugpunāyaka . pu
ligeṟegrāma vaśiṣṭagōtra gōva¨rddhana . nāgadēvasūnu gōpāḷayya . kuṁṭinakeṟeyūraṭṭa hara¨rhaliya
yammana maga kaliyaṇnaseṭṭi . siṁgaṇnaseṭṭi . hiṭṭa¨rceya caṭṭayya nākaseṭṭiya māḷayya . māḷakkana basavase
ṭṭi . Ajjinayyana sōvaya bāguḷiya muddayyana beḷayya . peṟekāṭiya biṭṭiga . Attalūra saṁgavayyana ci
kka bhāyipaseṭṭi . kētaseṭṭiya magaṁ masaṇayya . Aṁgaḍiya sattiyaṇaseṭṭi . I¨rtyetannā mānassa¨rvvātaśilāśaṁku
kṛṣṇataṭākakṣētra mananyōpayigutattaṭākajalaṁ sa¨rvvaparihārammahājinādāhāya tadanumatyacaṁdra
tāramaṇḍalēśvarāya muktavantaḥ Ētadaiparipālayanti tēṣāndāna samampalaṁ yitvataṁnāśayanti
bhrūṇahatya samādōṣastadācāha . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundarā ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyājāyatē krimiḥ . Apicadēvaspaṁ brāhmaṇaspaṁcalōbhinupahinastiyaḥ savāhātmāpara lō
kē gṛddōcciṣṭanabēvati . © vādībhapaṁcānana bhaṭṭaviṣṇuśāstrāṁbudhē®pāramitassuvṛttaḥ Aṇḍora ©
śaṁbhū®pada padmabhiṁragaḥ tatṭretra lēkhāvacanaṁvyadatta . tadgrāma janmātilakaḥ kulasyadēvadvicā
grya¨rccanadatta cittaḥ grāmaprayuktu likhitaṁ vyadatta sadakṣarakāśyapamādhavākhyaḥ .
© mahāgrāma lokkiguṇḍiya nāgava¨rmmōjaraḷiya rūvāri nākiya likita maṁgaḷa ©
Digital edition of SII 35.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
